title: July 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 31''' is the 212th day (213th in leap years) of the year, with 153 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Ian Roberts]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Scott Cleverdon]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Giancarlo Volpe]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Leinil Francis Yu]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 127|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 127]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 31]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith: The Collected Stories]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Tower of Alistan Nor]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: The Principal Strikes Back]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Join the Resistance: Attack on Starkiller Base]]'' published
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Galaxy's Edge 4|''Galaxy's Edge'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance Special 1|''Age of Resistance Special'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 4|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 4]] published.
